documentation.text: @notice Algebra V3 (QuickSwap on Somnia) swap router
@notice Minimal ERC-20 interface

@title  AionisAgentManager
 @author Aionis Team
 @notice Autonomous copy-trading protocol powered by Somnia's Agent Platform.
 @dev    Three-agent pipeline:
         ┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
         │  1. WATCHER (JSON API Agent, id=1)                              │
         │     Polls the Stellalpha off-chain API for the latest swap      │
         │     executed by a tracked leader wallet.                        │
         │                                                                 │
         │  2. STRATEGIST (LLM Inference Agent, id=2)                     │
         │     Receives the raw trade + follower risk profile and decides  │
         │     how much to copy: 0 (skip) … 100 (full allocation).        │
         │                                                                 │
         │  3. EXECUTOR (on-chain, this contract)                         │
         │     If decision > 0, swaps proportional USDC.e for WSOMI via   │
         │     QuickSwap and records the position.                         │
         └─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
         Full flow:
           startFollowing() ->> checkLeaderActivity() ->> onWatcherResponse()
           ->> onStrategistResponse() ->> executeCopyTrade() ->> emit events
@notice Somnia Testnet Agent Platform
@notice QuickSwap (Algebra V3) router on Somnia Mainnet
@notice WSOMI - token0, 18 decimals
@notice USDC.e (Stargate bridged) - token1, 6 decimals
@notice Base URL of the Stellalpha off-chain API used by the Watcher Agent
@dev Maximum age of a trade that the watcher may report (stale-signal guard)
@dev Minimum allocation decision (0-100). Below this, the trade is skipped.
@notice Configuration a follower sets when calling startFollowing()
@notice Context stored per in-flight agent request
@notice follower ->> FollowerProfile
@notice requestId ->> PendingRequest
@notice follower ->> requestId (latest active request)

0 = skip, 1-100 = copy percentage of max allocation.

literal_string "SELL trades should return 0 unless riskTolerance>=8. "

documentation.text:
@dev    Constructs a natural-language prompt for the LLM Agent and dispatches it.
         The LLM is constrained to respond with a single integer 0-100:
           0  = skip entirely
           1-99 = copy with that percentage of maxAllocation
           100 = copy with full maxAllocation

Team","details":"Three-agent pipeline:         \u250c\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2510         \u2502  1. WATCHER (JSON API Agent, id=1)                              \u2502         \u2502     Polls the Stellalpha off-chain API for the latest swap      \u2502         \u2502     executed by a tracked leader wallet.                        \u2502         \u2502                                                                 \u2502         \u2502  2. STRATEGIST (LLM Inference Agent, id=2)                     \u2502         \u2502     Receives the raw trade + follower risk profile and decides  \u2502         \u2502     how much to copy: 0 (skip) \u2026 100 (full allocation).        \u2502         \u2502                                                                 \u2502         \u2502  3. EXECUTOR (on-chain, this contract)                         \u2502         \u2502     If decision > 0, swaps proportional USDC.e for WSOMI via   \u2502         \u2502     QuickSwap and records the position.                         \u2502         \u2514\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2518         Full flow:           startFollowing() ->> checkLeaderActivity() ->> onWatcherResponse()           ->> onStrategistResponse() ->> executeCopyTrade() ->> emit events","kind":"dev","methods":{"checkLeaderActivity(address)":{"details":"Anyone can call this for any active follower (acts as a keeper).         Dispatches a JSON API request to the Stellalpha off-chain API asking         for the leader's latest swap.         Request data format for JSON API Agent:           abi.encode(url, jsonPath)         The agent fetches the URL and extracts the value at jsonPath.","params":{"follower":"The follower to check on behalf of"}},"deposit(uint256)":{"params":{"amount":"USDC.e amount (6 decimals)"}},"onStrategistResponse(bytes32,bytes)":{"details":"Response is ABI-encoded uint8 in range 0-100.           0          ->> skip           1-99       ->> copy at that % of maxAllocation           100        ->> full allocation","params":{"requestId":"Matches a pending request in ANALYZING stage","response":"ABI-encoded uint8 copy score from the LLM"}},"onWatcherResponse(bytes32,bytes)":{"details":"Response is ABI-encoded:           (address tokenIn, address tokenOut, uint256 amountIn,            uint256 amountOut, uint256 tradeTimestamp)","params":{"requestId":"Matches the requestId from checkLeaderActivity()","response":"ABI-encoded trade data from the Watcher Agent"}},"startFollowing(address,uint8,uint256,uint256)":{"details":"Caller must have approved this contract to transfer `initialDeposit`         of USDC.e before calling.","params":{"initialDeposit":"USDC.e to deposit into the vault now","leader":"The wallet to copy-trade","maxAllocationUsdc":"Max USDC.e per trade (6 decimals, e.g. 100e6 = $100)","riskTolerance":"1 (conservative) ->> 10 (aggressive)"}}},"stateVariables":{"MAX_TRADE_AGE":{"details":"Maximum age of a trade that the watcher may report (stale-signal guard)"},"MIN_EXECUTE_SCORE":{"details":"Minimum allocation decision (0-100). Below this, the trade is skipped."}},"title":"AionisAgentManager","version":1},"userdoc":{"kind":"user","methods":{"AGENT_PLATFORM()":{"notice":"Somnia Testnet Agent Platform"},"AIONIS_API()":{"notice":"Base URL of the Stellalpha off-chain API used by the Watcher Agent"},"QUICKSWAP_ROUTER()":{"notice":"QuickSwap (Algebra V3) router on Somnia Mainnet"},"USDCE()":{"notice":"USDC.e (Stargate bridged) -
